Bash(cd "D:/桌面/项目/心偶/提示词" && python3 -c "
import zipfile, re, sys
for fname in ['00基础设定.docx', '00工作模式.docx', '【家庭】场景模块.docx']:
    print\('='*60\)
    print\(f'FILE: {fname}'\)
    print\('='*60\)
    try:
        with zipfile.ZipFile\(fname\) as z:
            with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
                text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', content\)
                text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
                print\(text[:3000]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 || python -c "
import zipfile, re, sys
for fname in ['00基础设定.docx', '00工作模式.docx', '【家庭】场景模块.docx']:
    print\('='*60\)
    print\(f'FILE: {fname}'\)
    print\('='*60\)
    try:
        with zipfile.ZipFile\(fname\) as z:
            with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
                text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', content\)
                text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
                print\(text[:3000]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import subprocess
files = [
    'D:/桌面/项目/心偶/计划书/心偶大创申报书.doc',
    'D:/桌面/项目/心偶/计划书/（王）心偶大创申报书.doc',
    'D:/桌面/项目/心偶/计划书/（田）心偶大创申报书.doc',
    'D:/桌面/项目/心偶/计划书/（陈）软件部分流程图.doc',
]
for f in files:
    print\(f'=== {f} ==='\)
    try:
        result = subprocess.run\(['antiword', f], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10\)
        print\(result.stdout[:200] if result.stdout else f'\(no stdout, stderr: {result.stderr[:200]}\)'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import win32com.client, os

word = win32com.client.Dispatch\('Word.Application'\)
word.Visible = False

names = ['main', 'wang', 'tian', 'chen']
for name in names:
    inpath = os.path.normpath\('C:/temp_xinou/' + name + '.doc'\)
    outpath = os.path.normpath\(os.path.expanduser\('~'\) + '/xinou_' + name + '.txt'\)
    try:
        doc = word.Documents.Open\(inpath\)
        text = doc.Content.Text
        with open\(outpath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
            f.write\(text\)
        doc.Close\(False\)
        print\(name + ': OK ' + str\(len\(text\)\) + ' chars'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(name + ': ' + str\(e\)\)

word.Quit\(\)
")
